name: din-rail
description: EN 60715 top-hat (TS35) DIN-rail profile dimensions for both standard (35x7.5mm) and deep (35x15mm) depth variants, plus a support-free printable rail-mounting snap clip. See RESEARCH.md for per-dimension evidence and tiering.
